action: Clear all remaining cache data associated with flow1 review mode, including source_conv_id and avatars (genre_to_avatar_id), to ensure a clean slate before reviewing flow1 again.
fallback_action: If cache clearing fails in the future, notify the user and prompt them to specify which cache keys should be reset, or to provide troubleshooting instructions.

recipe.steps: Identify relevant cache keys containing data related to flow1 review mode, such as source_conv_id and avatars (genre_to_avatar_id).
Use the memory management tool to reset the value of source_conv_id.active_window to an empty string.
Use the memory management tool to reset the value of avatars.genre_to_avatar_id to an empty string.
